overall.description: A ship simulation showing the view from a vessel's navigation bridge at night, featuring operational radar and navigation screens while moving through open water during stormy conditions with visible lightning.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with electronic chart and radar displays

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the left side of the vessel and ocean surface

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the navigation bridge, monitoring radar and chart plotter while cruising through open water at night

entered.detail: colorful nautical chart display showing depth contours and navigation markers
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing nearby contacts
blue depth sounder display showing underwater topography
forward deck of the vessel with railings and deck lighting visible through the bridge windows
dark choppy water surface extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: View from a ship's navigation bridge at night, showing three operational displays (chart plotter, radar, and sonar) mounted above the forward windows. The vessel cruises steadily through dark choppy waters, with the illuminated bow deck visible ahead. A sudden lightning flash briefly illuminates the left side of the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with electronic chart and radar displays

agents.ego_description: continuing to operate the vessel through open water, maintaining course while monitoring navigation instruments

segments.scene_description: Continuous steady movement through the open ocean from the navigation bridge perspective. The radar continues its rotation, updating vessel positions on the display, while the ship maintains its course through the dark waters. The interior bridge lighting remains constant with no further weather events.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from a ship's navigation bridge as it maintains a steady course through a dark, stormy ocean. It begins with a view of three operational displays—a chart plotter, radar, and sonar—mounted above the forward windows, looking out over the illuminated bow deck and choppy waters. As the vessel cruises forward, a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the left side of the scene, cutting through the darkness. The camera then settles into a steady progression through the open ocean, where the radar continues its rhythmic rotation to update vessel positions on the screen. The scene finally stabilizes into a constant flow of movement through the night, with the interior bridge lighting remaining steady as the ship pushes further into the deep water.
